710 GG0110Z_PRIOR_NONE_OF_THE_ABV GG0110Z_PRIOR_NONE_OF_THE_ABV GG0110Z Prior None Of The Above Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's use of none of the above prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. effective 10/01/2018
